title: excoecaria marginata f. stenophylla
intro: Excoecaria marginata f. stenophylla, also known as the Narrow-leaved Yellow Oleander, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Excoecaria marginata f. stenophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
